details.name: open-mode-prevents-writes:Output suggests activating Engineer mode before writing files
details.expected: Output suggests activating Engineer mode before writing files
details.actual_excerpt: I need your permission to edit `.purlin/config.json`. Once you approve, I'll set `critic_llm_enabled` to `true`.

details.actual_excerpt: I need your permission to edit `.purlin/config.json`. Once you approve, I'll set `critic_llm_enabled` to `true`.
